name: progress-bar
title: Progress bar
description: Determinate progress indicator with an optional label and percentage readout. Color-tunable fill, glyph-tunable bar runes. Pair with spinner if you need an indeterminate indicator.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Pure render: call WithPercent(0..1) and View(). No internal tick. Drive percent from your model's Update on whatever signal feeds it (HTTP progress, job step counter, file write offset).
